title: Technician x 6 (Contract / Rotate Shift / 4343 / No Exp Req)
description:
Key Responsibilities:

  • Handle basic checks, simple fixes, and swapping out of electronic devices and computer equipment whenever needed.

  • Coordinate with the relevant government teams when faulty items need to be collected, returned, or followed up on.

  • Keep track of equipment issues, spot any recurring patterns, and update the team with monthly summaries.

  • Help members of the public use the on-site machines by guiding them through the steps and answering simple questions.

General Requirements:

  • Possess NITEC in Electrical/Electronic or a related discipline.

  • Able to work rotating shifts (4-day work week).

  • Training will be provided.

Work Schedule & Locations

  • 4-day work week (3 days off).

  • Rotating day and night shifts (8am–8pm / 8pm–8am).

  • Work locations: Woodlands / Tuas (Fixed Location)

Lee Wan Jinn, Yuni EA License No.: 02C3423 Personnel Registration No.: R21102995

postedCompany.description:
Manpower® is a global leader in contingent staffing and permanent resourcing, providing companies with strategic and operational flexibility and creating talent at scale.

As part of ManpowerGroup®, the world leader in innovative workforce solutions, we deliver high-impact strategies that help organizations achieve their business goals and enhance competitiveness.

Since 1996, Manpower Singapore has partnered with businesses to provide a continuum of staffing solutions—from incidental to strategic—helping them win in a rapidly changing world of work. At the same time, we empower jobseekers to find roles that match their skills and ambitions.

Our specialized recruiters leverage data-driven insights to assess, guide, and place people into meaningful, sustainable employment, enabling individuals to build rewarding careers while helping organizations thrive.

We work with hundreds of SMEs and multinational companies across diverse industries, including:

  • Banking & Finance
  • Corporate Finance & Accounting
  • Call Centers
  • Engineering
  • Events & Exhibitions
  • Healthcare
  • Hospitality
  • Information Technology
  • Life Sciences
  • Logistics & Supply Chain
  • Oil & Gas
  • Retail

Whether you’re looking for your next opportunity or seeking talent to power your business, Manpower Singapore creates powerful connections that unlock potential and drive success.

Learn more at manpower.com.sg or follow us on LinkedIn (https://www.linkedin.com/company/manpowersingapore/)
